tasks.check: deno check type datetime duration daterange fs string response
tasks.docs: deno task --cwd datetime docs && deno task --cwd type docs && deno task --cwd duration docs && deno task --cwd daterange docs && deno task --cwd fs docs && deno task --cwd string docs && deno task --cwd response docs
tasks.ok: deno fmt && deno task lint && deno task check && deno task test
